raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu klaafait ta KUN-
GA Wahrdü wiffa Juhda/ kas
Egiptes-Semmê dshwo; Rau-
gi/ es swehreju pee fawa leela
Wahrdü/ fakka tas KUNGS?
Ka mans Wahrdü ar jebkahda
Wihra Mutti wiffa Egiptes-
Semmê wairs ne taps faukts/
kas tazzitu? Tik teefchain ka tas
Kungs KUNGS dshwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redü/ es buhshu nomoh-
dâ pahr teem par Launu/ un ne
par Labbu/ un wiffi Wihti no
Juhda/ kas Egiptes-Semmê irr/
taps famaitati zaur Sobbinu/
um zaur Baddü/ teekams tee pa
Gallam irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kas Sobbinam irr
isbehgutchi/ tee atgreestsees no
Egiptes-Semmes uhs to Sem-
mi Juhda/ weens mats Puks/
um tad atsihs wiffi Atlikkuschee
no Juhda/ kas Egiptes-Semmê
irr nahkuschi par Sweechinee-
keem tur mist/ kurra Wahrdü pa-
stahwehs/ arrig mans/ jeb win-
nu (Wahrdü?)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas buhs jums par
Sihmi/ fakka tas KUNGS/ ka
es juhs tchai Weeta peemekele-
schu/ ka juhs sinnat/ ka manni
Wahrdü pahr jums nahks par
Launu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tä fakka tas KUNGS?
Raugi/ es nodohschu Warail
Avru to Egiptes Rehninatt win-
na Eennidneekem Rohkâ/ un
eem Rohkâ/ kas winna Dweh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rehninu no Juhda Rohkâ dew
esmu NebukadRezaxam/
ta
Rehninain no Babeles/ win
Eennaidneekain/ un kas win
Dwehseli mekleja,
Ta XLV. Nodatta.
Jeremijus eepreezina to Bahruku/ ka win
buhß pee Dshwibas paturretam cup t
2. etc.
Chis irr tas Wahrd
lo tas Praaweets Je
imius irr runnais u
Bahruku Nerijus Dehla /
winsch schohs Wahrdus no
remijus Muttes weena Gr
mata rakstija/ zettorta Gad
Jojakima ta Dehla Josijus/
Rehnina no Juhda/ un fazziju
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tä fakka tas KUNG
tas Israëla Deews uhs t
Bahruk;
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu fakki: Maj man!
tas KUNGS irr Behdas p
mannahn Sabpehm peelizz
es esmu peekuffs no man
Nopuhschanas/ un Duffesch
es ne atrohmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tä buhs tew uhs win
fazzibt: Tä fakka tas KUN
Redsi/ lo es esmu uhstaitijs/
es nolanschn/ un ko es dehsf
to es isravju/ lihds ar wiffu
paschu Semini.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu mekle preeksch ten
leelas Leetas? Ne mekle (tah
jo rangi/ es weddu Launu
pahr wiffu Meeju/ fakka
KUNGS: Bet es dohscbu
wim tavu Dwehseli ka La
ju
"
    }
  ],
